channel.title: GDB on Memo
channel.description: Recent content in GDB on Memo

item.title: GDB Symbol
item.description: Version # Source code: https://sourceware.org/git/binutils-gdb.git GDB v13.0 Data Structures # File: gdb/symtab.h struct symbol : public general_symbol_info, public allocate_on_obstack { symbol () /* Class-initialization of bitfields is only allowed in C++20. */ : m_domain (UNDEF_DOMAIN), m_aclass_index (0), m_is_objfile_owned (1), m_is_argument (0), m_is_inlined (0), maybe_copied (0), subclass (SYMBOL_NONE), m_artificial (false) { /* We can't use an initializer list for members of a base class, and general_symbol_info needs to stay a POD type.
